dimensio 0.2.1.9000
  • Reference
  • Changelog

CA Results

Source: R/AllClasses.R
CA-class.Rd

An S4 class to store the results of a simple correspondence analysis.

See also

Other class: MultivariateAnalysis, MultivariateBootstrap, MultivariateResults, MultivariateSummary, PCA-class

Author

N. Frerebeau

Examples

## Load data
data("zuni", package = "folio")

## The chi square of independence between the two variables
stats::chisq.test(zuni)

#> Warning: Chi-squared approximation may be incorrect
#> 
#> 	Pearson's Chi-squared test
#> 
#> data:  zuni
#> X-squared = 54934, df = 7123, p-value < 2.2e-16
#> 

## Compute correspondence analysis
X <- ca(zuni)

## Get row coordinates
get_coordinates(X, margin = 1)
